name: JHSF Participacoes S.A.
summary: JHSF Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A., through its subsidiaries, engages in the development and administration of shopping centers, hotels, and airports. The company operates through Recurring Income, Real Estate Business and Airport, and Hotels and Restaurants segments. It develops large-scale mixed-use residential and commercial buildings; provides mall services, such as administration, parking, and supply of energy and telecommunications; operation and management of airfield; and operates retail stores, as well as hotels and restaurants. The company operates shopping centers under the JHSF, Fazenda Boa Vista, Cidade Jardim Mall, and Catarina Fashion Outlet names; 7 hotels and 27 restaurants and bars under the Fasano brand. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
